summary.en-US: Search poedb.tw (the Path of Exile database) from your address bar. Type 'poedb', press space, and search.

description.en-US:
Add a fast keyword search for poedb.tw, the Path of Exile database, to your browser.

Just type 'poedb' in the address bar, press Space, then enter what you're looking for - items, skills, gems, mods, monsters, anything. Press Enter to see the results.

Features:
- Omnibox keyword: type 'poedb' + Space to search instantly
- Handles fuzzy and partial queries
- Open results in the current tab, or Alt+Enter for a new tab
- Zero configuration, no accounts, no tracking
- Lightweight and open source

Because poedb.tw's on-site search requires a session token, this extension routes queries through a Google site search scoped to poedb.tw/us.

This is an unofficial, fan-made extension and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Grinding Gear Games or poedb.tw.
